prompt: Create an 8K DSLR-style cinematic portrait of a stylish young woman standing centered in a warmly lit festive night street or market corridor. She has dark brown to black medium-length layered hair with soft face-framing waves, and her face is softly anonymized with a smooth square blur while preserving the natural head shape. Her head is slightly tilted and she poses with both hands raised near her chest, forming two small finger-heart gestures. She wears pastel streetwear: a cropped light blue denim jacket with visible seams, metal buttons, flap chest pockets, and a small embroidered patch on the viewer-right chest reading "Twar Edge" with a tiny heart; underneath is a plain white T-shirt tucked into a high-waisted deep red pleated skirt. Use a waist-up to mid-thigh portrait composition, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, and warm golden-red ambient lighting. The background should be softly blurred with red hanging decorations, glowing lantern-like lights, gold accents, and circular bokeh highlights, creating a romantic festive atmosphere. Photorealistic DSLR look, natural fabric texture, realistic hands, cinematic color grading, sharp subject against a blurred background, vertical social-media portrait framing but square crop. Avoid extra people in focus, avoid distorted fingers, avoid text other than the jacket embroidery, no watermark.
